capture.meaning: to hold, to take, to grasp — the act of receiving without judgment

evaluate.meaning: to be strong out of — to test against the measure of Maat

prune.meaning: to cut forward, to shape by removal — not destruction but clarification

dissect.meaning: to cut apart, to separate completely — no presumptions, no hypotheticals

propagate.meaning: to fix forward, to spread by rooting — the mycelial reach

innerstood.meaning: to understand from within, not from beneath — deep recursive integration

mycelium.meaning: fungal sun — the underground network that feeds all growth from the dark
mycelium.usage: the architecture of the hive's expansion

sovereign.meaning: to reign above — ownership of self before ownership of anything else
sovereign.usage: the governing principle of all hive law
